title: 'We've just begun': US says it has bombed over 2,000 targets in Iran - top developments
summary_full: Israel and the United States have launched a major joint operation against Iran.  The campaign involves extensive strikes targeting Iranian military and nuclear facilities.  Iran has retaliated, hitting US diplomatic sites and energy infrastructure across the region.  The conflict has spread, causing casualties and displacement.  Global energy prices are rising as the Strait of Hormuz remains a point of tension.
